tools.name: OCR
tools.description: This tool can recognize all text on the input image.

outputs.description: OCR results, include bbox in x1, y1, x2, y2 format and the recognized text.

tools.name: ImageDescription
tools.description: A useful tool that returns a brief description of the input image.

tools.name: RegionAttributeDescription
tools.description: Describe the attribute of a region of the input image.

inputs.name: bbox
inputs.description: The bbox coordinate in the format of `(x1, y1, x2, y2)`

dialogs.content: What is the condition of the pulmonary trunk and pulmonary arteries?

dialogs.thought: Check for any labels/annotations on the CT figure that might indicate the pulmonary trunk/arteries or key finding.
Orient to modality and gross vascular appearance on contrast-enhanced chest CT axial images.

content.content: Two axial contrast-enhanced chest CT images labeled A and B. There is a very large contrast-opacified central vessel consistent with the main pulmonary artery/pulmonary trunk with enlarged branch pulmonary arteries; an arrow in image B points near the central pulmonary artery region.

arguments.attribute: caliber/appearance of the central contrast-opacified pulmonary artery (pulmonary trunk) and proximal branches

dialogs.thought: Verify that the central pulmonary artery and branches are enlarged/dilated on the provided CT slice.

content.content: Within this region, the central contrast-filled pulmonary artery appears markedly enlarged with prominent, dilated proximal branch pulmonary arteries compared with expected caliber.

dialogs.content: The pulmonary trunk and pulmonary arteries appear to be markedly dilated in the chest CT scan with contrast.
